# Corrosion Test

**Summary**: A method to measure the weight loss of metal coupons in acidic or chemical fluids.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2017]] performed corrosion-test on L-80 alloy tubes to evaluate safety for field use.

## Key Results and Findings

- DTPA/SW showed a corrosion rate of 0.0034 g/cm2, significantly lower than the HCl standard. ([[2017-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2017, p. 141]])
